errors.notFoundMessage: The page you requested does not exist or was moved.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage listings, send requests, and track your exchanges.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your Kitab account and start sharing books with readers near you.

home.title: Buy, sell, and exchange books with readers near you
home.description: Kitab is a peer-to-peer book exchange where you can list titles, discover local readers, and arrange sales or swaps without a middleman.
home.panelDescription: Everything you need to move books between readers in one place.

panel.point1: List books for sale or exchange in minutes.
panel.point2: Filter by category, condition, and price.
panel.point3: Contact owners securely through Kitab requests.

features.browseDesc: Search and filter available titles from readers in your community.
features.listDesc: Publish listings with category, condition, and pricing details.
features.connectDesc: Send contact requests and manage incoming interest from one inbox.

home.heroLead: Discover your next great read. Trade books you've finished for ones you want, or buy and sell locally. Join a community that gives every book a second life.
home.howItWorksDesc: Start your book-trading journey in three simple steps.
home.step1Desc: Add books you want to sell or exchange.
home.step2Desc: Find books you want and propose trades.
home.step3Desc: Coordinate delivery and enjoy your new books!
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of readers exchanging books today.
home.featureSaveMoneyDesc: Why buy new when you can trade? Exchange books with others and save on reading.
home.featureEcoFriendlyDesc: Give books a second life and reduce waste. Sustainable reading for a better planet.
home.featureDiscoverDesc: Explore rare and unique books in your local community that you won't find in stores.

footer.description: A marketplace for buying, selling and exchanging books.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.description: Your Kitab profile and shortcuts to listings and requests.

books.title: Browse available books
books.description: Explore peer-to-peer listings for sale and exchange.
books.emptyMessage: Be the first to add a book or check back soon for new listings.
books.notFoundMessage: This listing may have been removed or completed.
books.newDescription: Tell readers what book you are offering and how they can reach you.
books.editDescription: Update your book details, price, and availability.

form.title: Title
form.author: Author
form.imagesHint: Drag and drop images here, or choose files to upload.
form.imageUploadFailed: Image upload failed. Use JPG, PNG, or WEBP files up to 5 MB.

myListings.title: My listings
myListings.description: Manage the books you have published on Kitab.
myListings.emptyMessage: Create your first listing to start selling or exchanging books.

categories.title: Book categories
categories.description: Browse the categories used to organize Kitab listings.
categories.emptyMessage: Categories will appear here once they are added by an administrator.

requests.title: Contact requests
requests.description: Review incoming interest and track requests you have sent.
requests.emptyMessage: When someone contacts you about a listing, the request will appear here.

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.description: Save books you want to revisit later.
wishlist.emptyMessage: Save books from browse results to compare them later.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Updates from requests, listings, and account activity.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Monitor Kitab categories, listings, and request activity.

categories.title: Category management
categories.description: Create, edit, and remove book categories for the marketplace.
categories.name: Category name
